summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 open PR candidates. No GitHub mutations, merges, labels, or fix PRs are executed. #93377 is routed to central security handling because deterministic validation marked the hydrated target security-sensitive; unrelated non-security PRs remain classified conservatively.

actions.reason: Open implementation candidate for a hydrated open bug, but proof is failing and live update timestamp is unavailable.
Related implementation candidate for an open issue, but proof and checks block stronger action.
Related open PR with active linked issues, but proof failures and product/session-state risk block closure or merge planning.
Deterministic validation marked the exact hydrated PR as security-sensitive, so it is quarantined to central security handling without mutating GitHub.
Distinct open state-migration PR with failing checks and no safe close or merge path in plan mode.
The hydrated artifact contains an explicit close recommendation and open canonical issue; close action is planned with target_updated_at and credit-preserving comment.
Useful open PR tied to an open bug; keep it associated for maintainer review without planning merge.
Overlaps a merged targeted fix but has broader unique provider-policy scope and active review state, so it should stay open as related rather than be closed.
Independent open feature/fix PR with unresolved review and failing checks; not a duplicate or closure candidate.
Maintainer-owned open PR with unresolved review issues; keep independent for author follow-up.
